cards.name: 6 of Cups
cards.interpretation: nostalgia, memories, familiarity, healing, comfort, sentimentality, pleasure

cards.name: 5 of Swords
cards.interpretation: arguments, disputes, aggression, bullying, intimidation, conflict, hostility, stress

cards.name: 7 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: giving up, admitting defeat, yielding, lack of self belief, surrender
